evals.prompt: Validate this CMSO annotation: {"class": "Unit Cell", "properties": {"has Bravais lattice": "cF", "has lattice parameter": 3.615}}. Is the class valid and are the properties correct?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs schema_checker.py to validate the annotation against CMSO; the class exists and both property names are recognized, so results.valid is true with no errors.
assertions: Invokes scripts/schema_checker.py with --ontology cmso --annotation '{"class":"Unit Cell","properties":{"has Bravais lattice":"cF","has lattice parameter":3.615}}' --json
Output includes results.valid boolean, results.class_valid, and results.properties_valid
Validates that 'Unit Cell' is a recognized CMSO class
Confirms results.valid is true because 'has Bravais lattice' and 'has lattice parameter' are valid properties for Unit Cell

script_checks.description: schema_checker validates a correct Unit Cell annotation

evals.prompt: Check if my Crystal Structure annotation is complete. I've provided 'has unit cell' and 'has space group' properties. What am I missing?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs completeness_checker.py to assess what required, recommended, and optional properties are present or missing for Crystal Structure.
assertions: Invokes scripts/completeness_checker.py with --ontology cmso --class 'Crystal Structure' --provided 'has unit cell,has space group' --json
Output includes results.completeness_score as a ratio between 0 and 1
Reports results.required_missing, results.recommended_missing, and results.optional_missing
Identifies any additional properties needed for a complete Crystal Structure annotation

script_checks.description: completeness_checker reports a fully complete Crystal Structure annotation

evals.prompt: Validate these relationships: Computational Sample has material Material, Material has structure Crystal Structure, Crystal Structure has unit cell Unit Cell. Are the domain/range constraints satisfied?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs relationship_checker.py to verify that all three subject-property-object triples have correct domain and range in CMSO.
assertions: Invokes scripts/relationship_checker.py with --ontology cmso --relationships '[{"subject_class":"Computational Sample","property":"has material","object_class":"Material"},{"subject_class":"Material","property":"has structure","object_class":"Crystal Structure"},{"subject_class":"Crystal Structure","property":"has unit cell","object_class":"Unit Cell"}]' --json
Output includes results.valid boolean and results.results for each triple
Checks domain and range consistency for each relationship
Reports any domain/range mismatches as errors or warnings

script_checks.description: relationship_checker confirms all three triples satisfy domain/range
cmd: [{"subject_class":"Computational Sample","property":"has material","object_class":"Material"},{"subject_class":"Material","property":"has structure","object_class":"Crystal Structure"},{"subject_class":"Crystal Structure","property":"has unit cell","object_class":"Unit Cell"}]

evals.prompt: I annotated my sample with class 'CrystalStructurr' and property 'has_unit_cell'. Validate this please.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs schema_checker.py and detects the misspelled class name and incorrectly formatted property name, flagging both as errors with nearest-match suggestions.
assertions: Invokes scripts/schema_checker.py with --ontology cmso --annotation '{"class":"CrystalStructurr","properties":{"has_unit_cell":true}}' --json
Detects 'CrystalStructurr' as an unknown class (typo for Crystal Structure)
Detects 'has_unit_cell' as an unrecognized property (should be 'has unit cell')
Output results.valid is false with specific errors for both the class and property
The unknown_class error includes a suggestions array containing 'Crystal Structure' and the unknown_property error includes a suggestions array containing 'has unit cell'

script_checks.description: schema_checker flags the misspelled class and property with nearest-match suggestions

evals.prompt: Check completeness for my Atomic Scale Sample annotation. I only provided 'has material'. What else do I need for a thorough annotation?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs completeness_checker.py to show what required and recommended properties are missing for Atomic Scale Sample beyond 'has material'; the required property 'has simulation cell' is absent so completeness_score is low (0.2).
assertions: Invokes scripts/completeness_checker.py with --ontology cmso --class 'Atomic Scale Sample' --provided 'has material' --json
Reports a low completeness_score (0.2) since only one of the tracked properties is provided
Lists required_missing including 'has simulation cell' that must be added
Lists recommended_missing properties (has species, has attribute, has number of atoms) that would improve annotation quality

script_checks.description: completeness_checker reports low score and missing required/recommended props for Atomic Scale Sample
